creator: tcovert+freebsd@sahuagin.net
text:
I was able to add a new package without incident.

# pkg install picard

        libdiscid: 0.6.1 [FreeBSD]

The process will require 5 MB more space.
884 KB to be downloaded.

pkg upgrade -f still returns Abort trap.
